# Edge ASR Latency Benchmarks for WebRTC Voice AI

This site publishes reproducible local and edge ASR latency evidence for real-time WebRTC and Voice AI systems.
Use the manifest for machine-readable benchmark metadata and the detail pages for artifact-level provenance, integrity, and measurement notes.

## Key URLs
- Benchmark homepage: https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/
- Manifest JSON: https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/manifest.json
- Sitemap: https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/sitemap.xml

## Current Comparable Tracks
- Parakeet 110M NeMo MLX: apple-silicon / auto; TTFB / first partial 250.7 ms; audio-end finalization 251.8 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/parakeet-mlx-110m-service-2026-06-21.html
- Faster-Whisper Base: cpu / int8; TTFB / first partial 676.5 ms; audio-end finalization 768.8 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-base.en-int8-2026-06-20.html
- Parakeet 110M NeMo: cpu / float32; TTFB / first partial 348.1 ms; audio-end finalization 622.1 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/parakeet-nemo-110m-compose-2026-06-21.html
- Qwen MPS: mps / auto; TTFB / first partial 336.4 ms; audio-end finalization 1541.9 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/qwen-mps-2026-06-21.html
- Faster-Whisper Small: cpu / int8; TTFB / first partial 1921.7 ms; audio-end finalization 1939.4 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-small.en-int8-2026-06-20.html
- Parakeet 0.6B Compose: cpu / float32; TTFB / first partial 953.7 ms; audio-end finalization 2214.0 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/parakeet-compose-2026-06-20.html
- Qwen Compose: cpu / float16; TTFB / first partial 680.1 ms; audio-end finalization 5802.5 ms; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/qwen-compose-2026-06-21.html

## Artifact Detail Pages
- Parakeet 110M NeMo MLX: Primary comparable evidence; status validated; measured Jun 21, 2026, 12:13 AM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/parakeet-mlx-110m-service-2026-06-21.html
- Faster-Whisper Base: Primary comparable evidence; status validated; measured Jun 20, 2026, 10:51 PM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-base.en-int8-2026-06-20.html
- Parakeet 110M NeMo: Primary comparable evidence; status validated; measured Jun 21, 2026, 01:26 PM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/parakeet-nemo-110m-compose-2026-06-21.html
- Qwen MPS: Primary comparable evidence; status validated; measured Jun 21, 2026, 02:11 PM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/qwen-mps-2026-06-21.html
- Faster-Whisper Small: Primary comparable evidence; status validated; measured Jun 20, 2026, 10:54 PM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-small.en-int8-2026-06-20.html

- Qwen Compose: Primary comparable evidence; status validated; measured Jun 21, 2026, 01:55 PM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/qwen-compose-2026-06-21.html
- Pipecat E2E Faster-Whisper Base: Historical supporting evidence; status legacy; measured Jun 17, 2026, 05:11 PM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-base.en-int8-pipecat-e2e-2026-06-17.html
- Parakeet 110M NeMo: Historical supporting evidence; status legacy; measured Jun 10, 2026, 03:11 AM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/parakeet-nemo-110m-compose-2026-06-09.html
- Faster-Whisper Base: Historical supporting evidence; status legacy; measured Jun 10, 2026, 02:16 AM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-base.en-int8-2026-06-10.html

- Faster-Whisper Small: Historical supporting evidence; status legacy; measured Jun 10, 2026, 02:23 AM UTC; details https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/pages/faster-whisper-small.en-int8-2026-06-10.html

- Qwen Compose: raw JSON https://benchmarks.webrtc.ventures/asr-latency/benchmark-results/qwen-compose-2026-06-21.json; 54.3 KB; SHA-256 99d6fa7d7433

## Selection Notes
- Primary comparisons use artifact-backed tracks with comparable live streaming metrics.
- Rank live turn-taking first by TTFB / first partial, partial cadence, and audio-end finalization before REST throughput context.
- Use confidence score, sample coverage, artifact hash, and measurement notes as tie-breakers before recommending a model lane.
- Blocked or registry-only lanes are documented in the manifest but omitted from the public comparison flow until publishable artifacts exist.

## Coverage
- Current comparable tracks: 7
- Validated tracks: 7
- Tracked lanes: 8
- Published current artifacts: 8
- Raw artifact files: 23
- Historical artifacts linked from detail pages: 15
